basics.name: Wenyang Liu
basics.label: Computer Vision & Robotic Perception Researcher
basics.summary: Computer vision and robotic perception researcher building reliable visual AI for smart manufacturing and real-world imaging systems. 20 publications, 300+ citations, and h-index 8.

work.name: Hyundai–NTU–A*STAR Corporate Lab, NTU
work.summary: Develop vision-based robotic perception systems for reliable industrial part picking in smart manufacturing.
highlights: Develop open-world object detection and segmentation methods combining language prompts and visual references
Build 6D pose estimation and grasp pose generation pipelines for cluttered industrial scenes
Adapt visual foundation models to previously unseen parts and real-world factory constraints

work.name: School of EEE, Nanyang Technological University
work.summary: Led research on image/video restoration, lightweight super-resolution, and corrupted multimedia recovery.
highlights: Published in CVPR, NeurIPS, IEEE TMM, ACM MM, and JVCIR
Developed deep learning models for visual degradation: bitstream corruption, watermark noise, low-resolution inputs
Built visual and byte-level representation models for multimedia forensics

publications.name: Bitstream-Corrupted JPEG Images Are Restorable: Two-Stage Compensation and Alignment Framework for Image Restoration
publications.summary: First-author work on restoring JPEG images from corrupted bitstreams.

publications.name: PromptSR: Cascade Prompting for Lightweight Image Super-Resolution
publications.publisher: IEEE TMM · CCF A · CAS Zone 1 TOP · JCR Q1
publications.summary: First-author work on prompt-guided lightweight image super-resolution.

publications.name: ByteNet: Rethinking Multimedia File Fragment Classification through Visual Perspectives
publications.publisher: IEEE TMM · CCF A · CAS Zone 1 TOP · JCR Q1
publications.summary: First-author work on visual representations for multimedia file fragment classification.

publications.name: Bitstream-Corrupted Video Recovery: A Novel Benchmark Dataset and Method
publications.summary: A benchmark dataset and recovery method for bitstream-corrupted video.

publications.name: SSH-Net: A Self-Supervised and Hybrid Network for Noisy Image Watermark Removal
publications.publisher: JVCIR · CCF C · CAS Zone 3 · JCR Q2
publications.summary: First-author self-supervised watermark removal without paired training data.

publications.name: HolyLight: A Nanophotonic Accelerator for Deep Learning in Data Centers
publications.summary: Co-first-author work on nanophotonic acceleration for efficient deep learning inference.

publications.name: Fine-Grained Task-Level Parallel and Low Power H.264 Decoding in Multi-Core Systems
publications.summary: First-author work on parallel and low-power H.264 decoding in multi-core systems.

courses: Thesis: Visual Image Restoration and Super-Resolution Using Deep Learning
Supervisors: Prof. Chau Lap-Pui (IEEE Fellow) and Assoc. Prof. Yap Kim-Hui
Efficient computing systems, low-power video decoding, AI hardware acceleration
